name: String Taut
description: Invisible string being pulled to maximum tension

prompts.label: invisible sonic string being pulled to maximum tension
prompts.text: invisible sonic string being pulled to maximum tension, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay

prompts.label: resonant wire stretching to its vibrating limit
prompts.text: resonant wire stretching to its vibrating limit, tape-saturated warmth, granular piano cloud, candlelight flickering softly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, smooth fade out

prompts.label: taut filament of sound trembling before release
prompts.text: taut filament of sound trembling before release, Brian Eno infinite space, reversed cymbal swell, underwater weightlessness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, sustained resonance

prompts.label: frequency climbing as string tension approaches breaking
prompts.text: frequency climbing as string tension approaches breaking, abandoned hall echo, harmonium drone with tape wobble, drifting between sleep and waking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, with natural decay

prompts.label: harmonic potential stored in near-snapping wire
prompts.text: harmonic potential stored in near-snapping wire, lo-fi cassette hiss and bloom, shimmer reverb pad wash, moonlight through frosted glass, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, smooth fade out
